definition: I2S intercepts the color_type equality CMP (value 0x03 = PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) and plants the constant at the IHDR color_type byte, enabling the palette-specific handler path that random mutation rarely satisfies.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the color_type and bit_depth integer CMPs, logs the small-integer enum comparands, and substitutes them at offsets 0x18/0x19, planting the exact forbidden pairing (palette+depth>8) that random mutation cannot assemble.
signature.one_line: I2S plants forbidden color_type/bit_depth enum pair at IHDR offsets

analysis.summary_one_line: IHDR color_type/bit_depth bytes must form an individually-valid but mutually-disallowed combination (e.g. PALETTE with depth>8, or RGB/GA/RGBA with depth<8)

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR bit_depth byte (offset 0x18) and color_type byte (offset 0x19) must each pass the prior validity gates (L2622 valid bit_depth set, L2629 valid color_type set) yet form a forbidden pairing: color_type==3 (PALETTE) with bit_depth>8, OR color_type in {2,4,6} with bit_depth<8.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog discovers seeds whose color_type/bit_depth bytes settle on the specific small-integer comparands the L2636 disjuncts test against; the winner takes the TRUE side at L2636 (T=45 F=0) and resolves on all 10 trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive only reaches the FALSE side at L2636 (T=0 F=17) and stays blocked on 9/10 trials; its color_type/bit_depth byte combinations never hit a valid-but-forbidden pairing because random byte mutation rarely lands exactly on the enum comparands.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer recording the operands of the color_type==N and bit_depth comparisons at L2636/L2622/L2629, finds the matching input byte at offset 0x18/0x19 and substitutes the other operand, planting the exact enum value needed to enter the forbidden combination.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the TRUE side of the L2636 color_type/bit_depth combination check.
The TRUE side fires for PALETTE+depth>8 or for RGB/GRAY_ALPHA/RGB_ALPHA with depth<8.
Winners take L2636 TRUE (T=45) while losers never do (T=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: T=45 F=0  T=0 F=17  if (((color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) && bit_depth ...  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: color_type and bit_depth pass their individual validity gates at L2622 and L2629 before reaching L2636.
cmplog wins over naive with the I2S delta, resolving 10/10 vs 1/10.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes one logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile wins over naive with the value_profile delta.
value_profile preserves inputs whose CMP operands are closer to matching as new CMP_MAP buckets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx wins over naive with the ctx_coverage delta.
naive_ctx's CtxHook records the same edge at different map slots per call path.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it

evidence_trail.claim: The discriminating bytes are at offsets 0x18 (bit_depth) and 0x19 (color_type) where W and L differ.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only on a valid-but-disallowed color_type/bit_depth pairing where cmplog, value_profile, and naive_ctx all fail to outperform naive (no resolution advantage) would refute that these three techniques each enable the forbidden-combination branch.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The naive_ctx (ctx_coverage) advantage is the least mechanistically tied to the byte feature — its win may reflect general corpus-retention diversity rather than anything specific to the color_type/bit_depth combination, and its hit_div is only 7 vs 144/103 for the CMP techniques.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE CMP, logs constant 3, and substitutes it at the single IHDR byte offset 0x19; naive must land that exact byte by blind havoc and never does in 10 trials.
signature.one_line: I2S plants palette color_type constant 3 at single IHDR byte

analysis.summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) for the line-119 true branch to fire.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 must hold the exact value 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE). The blocker line 119 compares png_ptr->color_type, derived directly from that IHDR byte, against the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE constant; only color_type==3 takes the true side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 10 cmplog winning seeds carry 03 at offset 0x19 (the byte-diff shows 03(.)x10 for W with no other values), so png_handle_IHDR records color_type=PALETTE and line 119 evaluates true (W branch fires T=10 F=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The naive loser seeds hold 00 or 04 at offset 0x19 (byte-diff shows L 00(.)x8 04(.)x2), neither of which is PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE, so line 119 is always false for the loser (L branch fires T=0 F=10) and it stays blocked all 24h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace intercepts the integer CMP at line 119 (color_type vs PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE constant 3), logs the constant operand into the CmpLogObserver buffer, then substitutes that value into the matching input byte at offset 0x19; naive has no CMP introspection and must land color_type==3 by blind havoc, which it never does in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of a comparison of png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE at pngread.c:119.
All winner seeds hold byte 0x03 at offset 0x19 while losers hold 0x00 or 0x04.
The winner takes the true side of line 119 in all 10 trials while the loser never does.
cmplog resolves the branch in all 10 trials and naive in none, with the loser blocked the full 24h.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for an operand match and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator and only blind havoc/token mutations.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==3 where naive resolves the branch as readily as cmplog (no I2S advantage), i.e. cmplog does not significantly out-resolve naive at the color_type==PALETTE gate.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The mode & PNG_HAVE_PLTE == 0 second conjunct on line 120 is also required for the chunk-error path, but the byte controlling PLTE-absence is not isolated in the byte diff, so the single-feature claim assumes color_type is the sole limiting factor.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE CMP at pngread.c:787, logs constant 3, and splices it into the single color_type byte at offset 0x19; naive's blind havoc byte mutation never lands 0x03 at that structurally-gated byte across 10 trials.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes palette color_type constant into single IHDR byte

analysis.summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 3 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) for png_read_end to take the true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type field (single byte at file offset 0x19) must hold the exact value 0x03 = PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE; the gate at pngread.c:787 compares png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE and only the true branch reaches when this byte parsed into color_type equals 3.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every cmplog winner-resolving seed carries 03 at offset 0x19, and the byte-diff shows W bytes 03(.)x4 concentrated at that offset versus the loser set; cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE CMP operand from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes 3 at the input offset, planting the required palette color_type.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive seeds carry non-palette color_type bytes at offset 0x19 (00 dominates, plus 06/04/02) and never reach the true branch; without CMP interception naive can only land color_type=3 by blind havoc byte mutation, which it failed to do in all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitution: the integer-CMP interception logs the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE operand and the i2s mutator splices value 3 into the color_type byte, a precise single-byte fix naive's havoc-only stack cannot reliably produce.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker at pngread.c:787 tests color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE.
cmplog winner seeds carry 03 at offset 0x19 while losers carry non-palette bytes there.
cmplog winner-resolving seeds take the true branch.

it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The grimoire>loss attribution to GeneralizationStage perturbation is inferential — both grimoire and cmplog have I2S, so I cannot directly observe in the seeds why grimoire fails to retain the color_type=3 byte, only that it shares the I2S stack yet loses.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the color_type==3 CMP, learns constant 3, and substitutes it at the single IHDR byte at offset 0x19; naive holds 0x00 or 0x04 at that offset and never reaches the palette true side in 10 trials.

hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All ten winner-resolving (cmplog) seeds carry 0x03 at offset 0x19 (BYTE DIFF shows 03(.)x10), so every winning input declares a palette image; per-role coverage confirms the true side and png_init_palette_transformations fire only in W.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking (naive) seeds never put 0x03 at offset 0x19 — they hold 0x00 (grayscale) or 0x04 (gray+alpha) — so color_type != PALETTE, the false branch is taken and png_init_rgb_transformations runs instead.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace intercepts the integer CMP color_type == 3, learns the constant 3 operand, and substitutes it at the matching input byte (offset 0x19); naive has only blind havoc and cannot reliably land the single exact constant 0x03 on that one structurally-gated byte.

The true side and palette-init path execute only in the winner-resolving seed set.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the color_type==0x03 comparison, finds the live color_type byte in the input, and substitutes the constant 0x03 at offset 0x19, solving a 1-in-256 equality by targeted substitution rather than blind havoc.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog wins 10/10 over naive's 1/10, value_profile 8/10, naive_ctx 10/10.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type == 3 in which cmplog resolves no faster than naive (no I2S advantage), or in which winners reach the branch with color_type bytes other than 0x03, would refute the offset-0x19==3 feature hypothesis.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile and naive_ctx attributions are inferred from mechanism descriptions and the shared 0x19==3 byte requirement; no value_profile/naive_ctx lineage was run to confirm those techniques (not I2S leakage) drove their wins.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the color_type CMP, records constant 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE), and substitutes it into the single IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19; naive must blindly land the exact value and never does in 10 trials.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes 0x03 into IHDR color_type byte for palette equality

analysis.summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) to take the true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type field (offset 0x19 in the header) must hold the exact value 0x03, the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE constant, so that the equality test png_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE at pngrutil.c:4457 evaluates true (also requires PNG_EXPAND set so the enclosing block at 4455 is entered).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 10 cmplog winner-resolving seeds carry 0x03 at offset 0x19, and the branch true side fired in all 10 (W L4457 T=10 F=0); cmplog discovered the resolving seed at 7s.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The naive loser-blocking seeds never hold 0x03 at offset 0x19 (they carry 0x00 x8 and 0x04 x2), so the equality never matches and the branch stays on the false side in all 10 trials (L L4457 T=0 F=10), keeping naive blocked for 24h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the integer CMP at pngrutil.c:4457 via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp, records both operands (the runtime color_type byte and the constant 0x03), and I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant 0x03 into the input at the offset where the current color_type byte appears; naive has only havoc/token mutators and no CMP introspection, so it must blindly land 0x03 on the single color_type byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality test of color_type against the PALETTE constant on the globally blocked true side.
Winner-resolving seeds carry 0x03 at offset 0x19 while loser-blocking seeds carry 0x00 (mostly) or 0x04.
The blocker true side fired in all 10 winner trials and zero loser trials.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L4457  T=10 F=0  T=0 F=10  if (png_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE)

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type == 0x03 where cmplog and naive resolve the branch at statistically equal rates and times, showing the single-byte equality is not what gives cmplog its advantage.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Whether the gate is purely the single color_type byte or also depends on PNG_EXPAND being set upstream (line 4455), which would make the resolving condition multi-byte rather than a clean one-byte I2S substitution.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the 1-byte CMP at pngset.c:276 via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp1, records constant 3 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE), and substitutes it into the color_type byte at offset 0x19; naive must blind-mutate a single exact byte.

hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 0x03 at offset 0x19 (W bytes 03(.)x30, all 30 occurrences), exactly matching the PALETTE constant compared at line 276.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds never hold 0x03 at offset 0x19 (L bytes 00(.)x7 04(.)x2 06(.)x1) so the color_type equality test is always false.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the integer CMP at line 276 via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp1, logging the constant operand 3; I2SRandReplace then substitutes 3 into the color_type byte, deterministically solving the equality where naive must blind-mutate the exact value.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with an equality gate color_type==3 on a single input byte where cmplog does NOT resolve the gate faster than naive (no prob_div / time advantage), which would refute the I2S-substitution mechanism.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile and naive_ctx hypotheses share the same single-byte equality feature as I2S, so their distinct mechanism attributions rest on technique knowledge rather than seed-byte evidence that uniquely separates the three winners.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the a==0/times==0 integer CMP, then substitutes the zero constant into the matching multi-byte fixed-point input field, satisfying the equality that naive cannot hit by blind mutation across varied chunk-type paths.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes zero into fixed-point field to satisfy equality-against-zero guard

analysis.summary_one_line: Reaching the TRUE side needs a parsed fixed-point argument (a or times) to equal exactly zero entering png_muldiv.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A PNG chunk whose parsed fixed-point value (e.g. gamma/chromaticity) is decoded to a==0 or times==0, so the equality-against-zero guard at png.c:3355 evaluates true; the winning seeds also vary the chunk-type FOURCC bytes at offsets 0x25-0x28 and 0x35-0x38 to reach chunk handlers that feed png_muldiv with a zero operand.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winners take the TRUE side 28 times (W T=28) versus zero for losers, and resolved the branch in 8/10 trials; their inputs diversify the chunk-type bytes (gAMA->iTXt/tEXt forms at 0x25-0x28) reaching code paths where a zero fixed-point reaches the multiply guard.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Losers never take the TRUE side (L T=0) and stay blocked in 9/10 (naive) and 8/10 (vp) trials; they keep churning the same gAMA/sRGB chunk bytes and the numeric fields never resolve to exactly zero for the a/times operand.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog and value_profile_cmplog run I2SRandReplace, which reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the a==0 / times==0 integer CMP and substitutes the logged constant (0) into the matching input offset, directly satisfying the equality; naive and plain value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must blind-mutate the multi-byte fixed-point field to exactly zero.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality-against-zero guard whose TRUE side is globally blocked.
Both decisive pairs differ only by the I2S technique.
The winner takes the blocked TRUE side while the loser never does, evidencing the winner satisfies the zero condition.
Winners diversify the chunk-type FOURCC bytes that losers leave fixed, reaching handlers that feed a zero operand.
The winner resolved the branch in 8/10 trials versus 1/10 for the naive loser, showing a strong per-trial divergence attributable to I2S.
The naive loser stayed blocked in 9/10 trials.
cmplog provides I2SRandReplace that substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets, enabling the zero-equality match.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: Plain value_profile has no I2SRandReplace, so the vpc>vp gap is attributable to I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the a==0||times==0 zero-equality gate over a multi-byte parsed fixed-point field where cmplog/vpc do NOT resolve faster than naive/value_profile (no dose-response on the zero-equality roadblock).

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: It is uncertain which specific chunk handler feeds the zero operand into png_muldiv, since no 1-hop caller fired in W and the FOURCC diversification is inferred rather than traced to the multiply call site.
